description.mekmm.recycler: レシピがある、不要なものを再生可能なものにリサイクルする機械です。
description.mekmm.planting_station: 作物を自動で栽培、収穫できる発展的な機械です。
description.mekmm.cnc_stamper: 金型を使用して物品に打ち付け、圧力で加工する機械です。
description.mekmm.cnc_lathe: 様々な機能を用いて材料を加工する機械です。
description.mekmm.cnc_rolling_mill: 機械的な力を利用して金属を曲げる機械です。
description.mekmm.replicator: 物理法則に逆らい、特定の物質を利用して物体を複製することが出来る機械です。
description.mekmm.fluid_replicator: 物理法則に逆らい、特定の物質を利用して流体を複製することが出来る機械です。
description.mekmm.chemical_replicator: 物理法則に逆らい、特定の物質を利用して化学物質を複製することが出来る機械です。
description.mekmm.ambient_gas_collector: 大気中から謎の物質を抽出する機械です。
description.mekmm.wireless_charging_stat: 所持品や防具を無線で充電する機械です。(Curios対応)
description.mekmm.wireless_transmission_: 5種類の物質を無線で送信できる機械です。
description.mekmm.author_doll: このModの作者のスキンを纏った人形です。愛でましょう。(Just decorations)
description.mekmm.modeler_doll: このModのモデラーのスキンを纏った人形です。(Thanks to everyone who provided textures and models for mekmm)
tooltip.mekmm.is_blocking: 機械の上部が塞がれています
tooltip.mekmm.no_blocking: 機械の上部は塞がれていません
list.mekmm.name: Name:%1$s
connector.mekmm.lose: There is no block at %1$s, or the block is not the one before connecting
info.mekmm.jei.unstable_dimensional_gas: Use an Ambient Gas Collector for collection(%1$smb/t), and be careful not to place blocks above the machine.

configuration.mekmm.general.chemical_rep: The recipes added here will be added to the chemical replicator. Write using modid:registeredName#amount, # followed by the amount(not null or zero) of UU matter consumed. For example:["mekanism:oxygen#10","mekanism:hydrogen#100"]
configuration.mekmm.general.fluid_replic: The recipes added here will be added to the fluid replicator. Write using modid:registeredName#amount, # followed by the amount(not null or zero) of UU matter consumed. For example:["minecraft:water#10","mekanism:heavy_water#100"]
configuration.mekmm.general.item_replica: The recipes added here will be added to the item replicator. Write using modid:registeredName#amount, # followed by the amount(not null or zero) of UU matter consumed. For example:["minecraft:stone#10","mekanism:basic_bin#100"]
configuration.mekmm.general.charging.rat: Amount of Energy(joules) an item can receive per tick from a Wireless Charging Station.
configuration.mekmm.general.collect.amou: mB of Unstable Dimensional Gas collected by the Ambient Gas Collector.

configuration.mekmm.server.generator.gas: The capacity in mB of the chemical tank in the Large Gas-Burning Generator.
Settings for configuring Large Gas-Burning Generators
configuration.mekmm.server.generator.hea: The amount of lava in mB that gets consumed to transfer largeHeatGeneration Joules to the Large Heat Generator.
Multiplier of effectiveness of Lava that is adjacent to the Large Heat Generator.
Add this amount of Joules to the energy produced by a large heat generator if it is in an 'ultrawarm' dimension, in vanilla this is just the Nether.

Amount of energy in Joules the Large Heat Generator produces per tick. largeHeatGeneration + largeHeatGenerationLava * lavaSides + largeHeatGenerationNether. Note: lavaSides is how many sides are adjacent to lava, this includes the block itself if it is lava logged allowing for a max of 81 "sides".
The capacity in mB of the fluid tank in the Large Heat Generator.
Settings for configuring Large Heat Generators
mekmm.configuration.title: Mekanism: MoreMachine Config
fml.menu.mods.info.description.mekmm: Added more machines and factories to Mekanism
